creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Makefile chaged:


This Site not exist more

-MASTER_SITES=	http://download-1.gingerall.cz/download/sablot/
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}


CFLAGS changed

+CFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include -L${LOCALBASE}/lib


Documentation changed, clear instalation

+DOCSRCDIR1=	${WRKSRC}
+DOC_FILES1=	README README_JS RELEASE
+
+DOCSRCDIR2=	${WRKSRC}/doc/misc
+DOCSDIR2=	${DOCSDIR}/doc/misc
+DOC_FILES2=	DEBUGGER NOTES


OptionsNG

pkg-descr changed

-WWW: http://www.gingerall.org/sablotron.html
+WWW: http://www.gingerall.com/charlie/ga/xml/p_sab.xml
+WWW: http://sourceforge.net/projects/sablotron/


pkg-plist changed

Port maintainer (skv@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test and with RedPorts (all RELEASES, CLANG), sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found


Build log RedPorts

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20120919165457-58058/


Was used, what is unusual, FreeBSD portname is sablotron

PORTNAME=       Sablot


Right is

PORTNAME=       sablotron

DISTNAME=       ${PORTNAME:S/s/S/:S/ron//}-${DISTVERSION}


Original Port can't be installed, because DOCSDIR Mistake

/usr/ports/textproc/sablotron> " port test
